__fixture__.name: telemetry_backlog_paused_under_protect_core
__fixture__.scenario: The governor has entered protect_core after a sustained hot-path miss. The upload_replication lane is paused: queued bytes are preserved, no new transfers admit, and the lane projects overloaded on the shell runtime status. The diagnostics record shows a non-zero lane_depth and oldest_age, a last_checkpoint retained on a resumable chunk boundary, and cancellation_lag_ms = null because the policy is pause, not cancel. Telemetry and crash-upload jobs are never_stale, so they will resume at their chunk boundary once the governor leaves protect_core.

last_checkpoint.note: Support-bundle upload is paused at chunk 7. Resumable-chunk-boundary checkpoint is preserved; no bytes are discarded.

note: Governor is in protect_core; upload_replication lane is paused. Queued bytes and last-good chunk boundary are preserved. Surfaces project overloaded with the shell's protected path being preserved; automatic recovery on governor exit.
